split.title: A place where ambition finds its home.

landing.title: International Students
landing.summary: Join students from over 140 nationalities at Regent's University London. Everything you need to know about studying in London as an international student.

home.title: Study in the heart of London's most iconic park.
home.subtitle: Join over 4,000 students from 140 nationalities at a campus surrounded by Regent's Park — and a community that inspires you to think bigger.
